camp_1.name: Summer Collection Launch
camp_1.description: Introductory campaign showcasing premium cotton kurtas and printed tunics.

camp_2.name: Diwali Festive Dhamaka
camp_2.description: Premium heavy-embroidered suit sets and silk straight kurtas for festive seasons.

camp_3.name: VIP Early Access Sale
camp_3.description: Exclusive pre-sale catalog invite offering 20% discount on new Jaipuri arrivals.

camp_4.name: Instagram DM Recovery Campaign
camp_4.description: Follow up with users who enquired about kurti sizes but didn't finish billing.

camp_5.name: WhatsApp Reactivation Broadcast
camp_5.description: Win back slipping customers with a custom ₹250 flat discount voucher code.

camp_6.name: Anarkali Special Showcase
camp_6.description: Targeting previous kurti buyers with new geometric Anarkali cuts.

camp_7.name: Weekend Dailywear Flash Promotion
camp_7.description: Short flash sale (48 hours) on basic office wear tunics.

camp_8.name: Cart Leakage Autopilot
camp_8.description: Trigger automated follow-ups 30 minutes after shopping cart abandons.

camp_9.name: Cotton Kurtas Combo Blast
camp_9.description: Buy 2 Get 1 Free promotion on dailywear products.

camp_10.name: Monsoon Clearance Launch
camp_10.description: Seasonal clearance of past stocks with up to 40% markdowns.

opp_1.title: Instagram DM Cart Recovery
opp_1.description: Recover potential leads from social DM enquiries who abandoned carts.
opp_1.reasoning: Users who drop off in Instagram messages show extremely high recovery conversion rates when re-engaged on WhatsApp within 3 hours.

opp_2.title: Slipping VIP Recovery
opp_2.description: Win back premium buyers showing no purchase activity for 60+ days.
opp_2.reasoning: High LTV VIP customers representing substantial latent buying potential. Re-engaging them with early festive releases yields high conversions.

opp_3.title: Jaipuri Prints Cross-Sell
opp_3.description: Cross-sell new Jaipuri print models to cotton dailywear catalog buyers.
opp_3.reasoning: Customers purchasing dailywear cotton items have a 68% cross-sell affinity score toward premium Jaipuri patterned designs.

opp_4.title: Festive Gota Patti Early Access
opp_4.description: Offer pre-sale access to designer collections to high LTV buyers.
opp_4.reasoning: Top loyalty tier customers show extremely high conversion (over 40%) when offered early private slots on premium festive inventories.

opp_5.title: Cotton Dailywear Bundling
opp_5.description: Target new buyers with dailywear kurtis bundling offers.
opp_5.reasoning: New users who make single purchases are highly receptive to multi-buy combos to save on delivery fees.

opp_6.title: Monsoon Clearance Cross-Sell
opp_6.description: Clear out old stocks to dormant users with steep markdowns.
opp_6.reasoning: Dormant users who haven't opened emails react strongly to low-pricing clearout offers sent via SMS.

opp_7.title: Abandoned Checkout Email Loop
opp_7.description: Trigger automatic email vouchers for users dropping off at checkout.
opp_7.reasoning: Automatically emailing checkout drop-offs within 1 hour recovers up to 15% of cart values.

opp_8.title: Instagram Post Clearance Push
opp_8.description: Leverage Instagram DM post comments automation to boost conversion.
opp_8.reasoning: Setting up auto-replies to users commenting 'PRICE' on Instagram posts increases checkout completions by 28%.

opp_9.title: Cotton Dailywear Repeat Reminders
opp_9.description: Send re-purchase prompts for office wear kurtas at 90 days.
opp_9.reasoning: Dailywear items are subject to regular lifecycle decay; prompting re-purchase at 90 days drives repeat rates.

opp_10.title: Anarkali Suite Upsell Program
opp_10.description: Upsell premium heavy cotton Anarkali items to regular kurti shoppers.
opp_10.reasoning: Shoppers who bought 3+ basic kurtas are prime candidates for complete suite sets containing matching pants and dupattas.

opp_11.title: Slipping Dailywear buyers
opp_11.description: Re-engage basic wear buyers showing declining activity metrics.
opp_11.reasoning: Risk indicators include reduced page clicks and cart abandonment. A soft WhatsApp checklist offer mitigates risk.

opp_12.title: First Purchase Incentive Blast
opp_12.description: Push first checkout completions to newly registered users.
opp_12.reasoning: Users registering profiles but exiting checkout can be nudged with a special 10% welcome coupon code.

opp_13.title: Jaipuri Gota Patti Cross-sell
opp_13.description: Promote handblock premium print collections to top spenders.
opp_13.reasoning: VIPs show maximum ticket size growth when offered premium craft handblock prints and artisanal details.

opp_14.title: Abandoned checkout SMS reminder
opp_14.description: Trigger backup SMS notifications for cart recovery failures.
opp_14.reasoning: When WhatsApp recovery remains unopened for 12 hours, a failover SMS helps capture remaining intent.

opp_15.title: Silk Kurtas Festive Pre-order
opp_15.description: Collect advance bookings on upcoming silk festive catalogs.
opp_15.reasoning: Top customers prefer reservation programs. Booking silk designs in advance reduces inventory risk.

opp_16.title: Dormant Dailywear Reactivation
opp_16.description: Re-engage cotton kurta buyers inactive for 90+ days.
opp_16.reasoning: Dormant users can be reactivated by showing fresh dailywear designs and catalog lookbooks.

opp_17.title: Instagram Post Comment Automations
opp_17.description: Convert comments on viral posts into direct WhatsApp leads.
opp_17.reasoning: Connecting viral post comments to direct chat checkouts boosts conversion ratios.

opp_18.title: Office wear kurtas Cross-sell
opp_18.description: Introduce solid cotton kurtis to casual tunics buyers.
opp_18.reasoning: Office wear products hold high frequency buying traits. Cross-selling daily items drives repeat conversion.

opp_19.title: Festive Dupattas Add-ons
opp_19.description: Prompt dupatta matches at checkout for printed kurtas.
opp_19.reasoning: Gifting recommendations or matching dupatta add-on prompts increase order sizes by ₹350 on average.

opp_20.title: Inactive VIP winback RCS blast
opp_20.description: Send high definition lookbook catalog to dormant VIPs.
opp_20.reasoning: A visual rich lookbook works better than discount codes to bring back premium boutique buyers.

log_1.message: ORBIT Core System online. Loading brand intelligence matrices for Aura Threads node.

log_2.message: Initiated directory index scan of Aura Threads customer base. Mapped 500 nodes.

log_3.message: Audited abandoned Instagram shopping checkouts. Discovered 17 premium checkout drops representing ₹22,000 leakage.

log_4.message: Fitted regression models to Slipping VIP cohort. Calculated 3.8x ROI yield coefficients for recovery message templates.

log_5.message: Generated 3 copy layout variations for WhatsApp checkout nudges, focusing on cotton dailywear.

log_6.message: Operations dispatch pipeline initialized. Webhook response time checks: 12ms nominal. Ready to dispatch.

log_7.message: Isolating 120 tech-savier handblock print enthusiasts for early access collection launch.

log_8.message: Estimating revenue conversion curves. Optimal channel is RCS cards (estimated 42% conversions, ₹58,000 potential).

log_9.message: Crafting visual rich card structures with direct billing options for Gota Patti festive sets.

log_10.message: Dispatched 800 WhatsApp messages. Handshake rate: 100%. Delivery queues cleared.

log_11.message: Scheduled automated weekly re-engagement loops for Aura Threads. Scanning for checkout leakage.

log_12.message: Detected 22 abandoned checkout leads. Adding recovery priority tokens to active operational buffers.

log_13.message: Running random forest analysis on inactive dailywear purchasers. Selected SMS channel due to low active email rates.

log_14.message: Drafting high-conversion SMS copy layouts with embedded discount codes.

log_15.message: Dispatched SMS push clearances. Delivery rate: 98%. Recovered ₹15,000 in immediate purchases.

log_16.message: Scanning Loyalist graphs. Identified 8 VIP customers suitable for advance festival collections pre-orders.

log_17.message: VIP billing loops show zero friction points. Perfect cohort state for complete suite pre-order programs.

log_18.message: Expected VIP pre-order LTV bump is ₹15,000 per user. Forecasting ₹52,000 cumulative revenue (94% confidence).

log_19.message: Generated personalized WhatsApp templates with direct pre-order reservations and premium product cards.

log_20.message: Routing pre-order VIP links via conversational channels. Processing webhook confirmations.

log_21.message: Executing Aura Threads daily operations script. Performing database replication.

log_22.message: Daily cohort scan: 18 VIP customers flagged at risk. Slipping Away segment average risk score spikes to 78%.

log_23.message: Auditing slipping VIP behaviors. 8 accounts abandoned Gota Patti set checkouts in last 7 days. Action required.

log_24.message: Mitigation equations show high recovery scores (64% yield) when re-engaged within a 24h window. Suggested ROI: 4.2x.

log_25.message: Generated custom win-back designs with past checkout restorations. Optimized layout for WhatsApp message loops.

log_26.message: Win-back dispatch armed. Triggering automatic recovery notifications. Webhook listener active.

log_27.message: Executing weekly lookbook lookahead checks. Mapped 38 cotton dailywear buyer profiles.

log_28.message: Cotton dailywear buyers have been isolated. Mapped 38 profiles with high-frequency traits.

log_29.message: Dailywear buyers show high response yields (45% opens). Recommended channel: RCS cards containing lookbooks.

log_30.message: Dispatched weekly lookbook campaign. 38 threads executed successfully.
